text.title: typescript-patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Per-type routing through trust boundary, failure modality, and identity uniqueness.

decision-tree.root-question: Does this type originate from outside the program (HTTP body, env, queue, form, file)?

branch.conclusion: representation="zod-schema". validation in {zod-parse, zod-safe-parse}. Derive TS type via z.infer; do NOT declare a parallel interface.

branch.question: Does the value represent the outcome of an operation that can succeed-or-fail?

branch.conclusion: representation="discriminated-union". Pick a literal discriminator (kind / success / status). List variants.

branch.question: Is this type a string-or-number ID that could be confused with another ID?

branch.conclusion: representation="branded-string" or "branded-number". Add a factory function name in spec notes.
representation="interface". Use built-in utility types (Partial, Pick, Omit) for variants.

text.example: type=CreateOrderInput q-origin -> true (HTTP body) => conclusion r3-zod-as-source: zod-schema, zod-safe-parse, infer the TS type.
